name: Feature Request

title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What workflow is painful or missing?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature and how it would work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, links to related issues, or anything else that helps explain the request.
